messages.content: hello Jarvis
Hello, Moksh. How can I assist you today?
open
Automation supports opening and closing apps, plus creating, editing, moving, renaming, and deleting files or folders across your laptop except protected system locations.
open Microsoft edge
Opening Microsoft edge.
open Chrome open Spotify open Facebook
Opening Chrome open Spotify open Facebook.
new open none of them
I didn't open any of those apps, Moksh.
close File Explorer and edge
I could not find an open app matching File Explorer and edge.
close Microsoft edge
Closing Microsoft edge.
what is the current network of Ambani
Mukesh Ambani's network includes Reliance Industries, Jio, and various charitable foundations, with his children, Nita and Isha, holding significant positions in related companies.
what is his net worth
Mukesh Ambani's current net worth is estimated to be around $92 billion, Moksh.
mobile se billionaire in India
Byju Raveendran, founder of BYJU'S, is one of India's youngest billionaires, with a net worth of over $21 billion, primarily earned through his online education platform, Moksh.
who else is a billionaire from India
Mukesh Ambani, founder of Reliance Industries, and Dr. Dilip Shanghvi, founder of Sun Pharmaceutical Industries, are also billionaires from India, Moksh.
bhai Jarvis
You're addressing me directly, Moksh. What can I do for you?
by Jarvis
The current price of Jarvis is ₹0.4739 per JARVIS, with a total market cap of ₹19,739,110.25, Moksh.
bye Jarvis
Goodbye, Moksh. It was nice chatting with you. Until next time.
